Description: Unique incremental identifier for each recording row.
Fiscal Year designation based on the Bikram Sambat (BS) calendar system used officially in Nepal.
Corresponding calendar year in Anno Domini (AD).
Tracks temporal slices (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4, or Full_Year aggregates).
Annual real Gross Domestic Product growth rate adjusted for price inflation.
Growth performance index of the primary agricultural sector (crops, livestock, forestry, fisheries).
Growth performance index of manufacturing, construction, energy, and services.
Consumer Price Index (CPI) annual average inflation reflecting domestic price levels.
Total inbound funds sent by migrant workers overseas to families in Nepal, expressed in Billions of Nepalese Rupees.
Total expenditure on foreign commodity shipments brought into the country (CIF value, Billions NPR).
Total commercial revenue received from domestic products shipped abroad (FOB value, Billions NPR).
Gross foreign exchange assets held by Nepal Rastra Bank, denominated in Billions of United States Dollars.
Macroeconomic buffer metric calculating how many months of current import levels the existing FX reserves can cover.
